name: "Feature Request / 功能建议"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for PouchVerse · 为 PouchVerse 提出新功能或改进建议"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary / 功能摘要

<!-- A brief summary of the feature you'd like to see.
     简要描述您希望看到的功能。 -->

## Problem / 背景问题

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a frustration?
     这个功能解决了什么问题？ -->

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like.
     描述您希望的解决方案。 -->

## Alternatives Considered / 已考虑的替代方案

<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
     您是否考虑过其他替代方案？ -->

## Platform / 适用平台

- [ ] iOS / iPadOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] macOS (PouchVerse Transfer)
- [ ] Windows (PouchVerse Transfer)
- [ ] All platforms / 所有平台

## Additional Context / 补充信息

<!-- Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
     其他相关信息、设计草图或截图。 -->
